overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a covered neon-lit pedestrian walkway. The character stops at a large window to observe a futuristic holographic cityscape display, showcasing the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with industrial metal architecture and vibrant digital lighting.

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a character through a covered industrial walkway with corrugated metal ceilings and neon-lit digital billboards on the right wall. Warm LED strips line the floor edges, and a vending machine stands on the left. The character ahead walks steadily toward a window wall revealing blue light from outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: observation point overlooking holographic city display

events.description: camera moves past the character to focus on the holographic cityscape view outside the window

agents.ego_description: stopping at the window to observe the futuristic holographic city display with glowing blue geometric patterns

notable_agents.action: standing at the window ledge looking out at the holographic city projection

entered.detail: large glowing cyan-blue holographic display showing a futuristic cityscape with geometric architectural patterns

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the window wall to observe a massive holographic city projection glowing in cyan and blue outside. The camera moves past the character to focus on the intricate geometric patterns of the futuristic cityscape, while the corridor's digital billboards recede into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit industrial corridor that culminates in a sweeping view of a holographic cityscape. It begins by trailing a character through a covered walkway defined by corrugated metal ceilings, floor-level LED strips, and glowing digital billboards. As the character advances toward a wall of glass, the warm interior lighting gives way to a cool blue radiance emanating from the outdoors. The camera then glides past the character as they stop at the window, shifting focus from the receding corridor to the massive, cyan-colored geometric projections of a futuristic city.
